(7) Controlled Access Places (CAPS) facilities are required at the planning approval
(3,000 - 5,000 vpd) and/or building licence stages as appropriate.
This option is a modified service road concept
which provides a combined driveway and
parking facility as well as a cycling surface. It
has the following features:
• Increased road reserve width which
improves noise abatement.
• Improved safety for ingress and egress
points along the local distributor.
• Short lengths between entry and exit
points, usually 200 metres or 10 lots
maximum.
